overall.description: A static cinematic shot of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game (likely Hogwarts Legacy), showing students in robes dining at long house tables beneath floating candles. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the gothic stone architecture, tall windows, and warm ambient lighting of the medieval magical dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval magical dining hall with house tables

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the center aisle entrance, observing the dining hall and students

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes eating and conversing at the central Gryffindor table
students seated at the left house table, engaged in meal and conversation

entered.detail: long wooden dining table with red and gold house banner featuring lion crest
hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
long wooden benches and tables lined with dining students
long wooden benches and tables lined with dining students
tall arched stone windows with green-tinted glass allowing natural light
tall arched stone windows with green-tinted glass allowing natural light
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of the Great Hall's central aisle, looking toward the far end of the medieval dining chamber. Students in wizarding robes dine at long house tables beneath thousands of floating candles. Warm light mixes with daylight streaming through tall gothic windows, illuminating the stone floor and massive pillars while the Gryffindor house banner hangs prominently at the nearest table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze across the Great Hall, capturing the timeless atmosphere of a magical dining chamber. It begins with a wide view of the central aisle, looking toward the far end of the medieval space where students in wizarding robes dine at long house tables. As the eye wanders, thousands of floating candles cast a warm glow that blends with the natural daylight streaming through tall gothic windows. This light illuminates the polished stone floor and massive pillars, before the focus settles on the Gryffindor house banner hanging prominently at the nearest table.
